{"id":"massage-4m4","title":"Fix duplicate appointments via idempotent confirmation endpoint","description":"P1 Bug: Duplicate calendar events created on repeated admin confirmation

PROBLEM: /api/confirm endpoint creates new calendar event on each click
- No idempotency check
- requestId generated but never persisted in DB
- Multiple clicks = duplicate events

ROOT CAUSE: app/api/confirm/route.ts (lines 13-85)
- Only validates HMAC hash
- No duplicate detection
- No database tracking

SOLUTION: Supabase-backed appointment_requests table
- Track request status: pending → confirmed → cancelled
- Idempotency key: requestId (unique constraint)
- Audit trail: confirmed_by, confirmed_at, calendar_event_id

DATABASE:
New table: appointment_requests
- request_id (text, unique)
- status (pending/confirmed/cancelled)
- email, first_name, last_name, phone, start_time, end_time, duration
- location (jsonb), timezone
- calendar_event_id, calendar_event_link
- confirmed_by (uuid), confirmed_at (timestamptz)
- request_data (jsonb backup)
- created_at, updated_at

IMPLEMENTATION (5 phases, ~6 hours for phases 1-4):
Phase 1 (30 min): DB migration
Phase 2 (1h): Update handleAppointmentRequest.ts (insert pending)
Phase 3 (2h): Rewrite /api/confirm (idempotency + redirect)
Phase 4 (30 min): Simplify approval URLs
Phase 5 (3h future): Add Supabase auth integration

TESTING:
- First confirmation creates calendar event
- Second confirmation redirects to existing (no new event)
- Invalid requestId returns 404
- Cancelled appointments return 410
- E2E prevents duplicate appointments

READY TO IMPLEMENT: Yes (phases 1-4 can start immediately)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"trillium@trilliumsmith.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T20:52:15Z","created_by":"unknown","updated_at":"2026-03-01T20:52:15Z"}

{"id":"massage-tfix","title":"Fix broken confirm/decline tests after idempotency change","description":"massage-4m4 added getAppointmentByCalendarEventId() calls to confirm and decline routes but didn't mock them in tests.

10 tests failing — all same root cause: Supabase client init fails because getAppointmentByCalendarEventId is unmocked.

FIX: Add vi.mock for @/lib/appointments/getAppointmentByCalendarEventId in both test files, returning null by default (no existing appointment). This lets existing tests flow through to original logic.

Files to fix:
- app/api/confirm/__tests__/route.test.ts
- app/api/decline/__tests__/route.test.ts

Also add new test cases for the idempotency paths:
- already confirmed → redirect with already_confirmed=true
- already cancelled → 410 Gone (confirm) / 200 noop (decline)
- confirmed then decline → 409 Conflict

Verify: all 16+ tests pass with npx vitest run app/api/confirm/__tests__/route.test.ts app/api/decline/__tests__/route.test.ts","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"trillium@trilliumsmith.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T21:23:37Z","created_by":"Trillium Smith","updated_at":"2026-03-01T21:23:37Z"}
